user.title: Connect to PiBarTicker
user.description: Enter the URL of your PiBarTicker backend (e.g. {example})

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect. Check the URL and make sure the Pi is online.

init.title: Sensor mirroring
init.description: Pick Home Assistant entities to mirror to the PiBarTicker display. Configure display position in the PiBarTicker setup UI.

notify.name: Send alert
notify.description: Send an alert message to the PiBarTicker display.

level.name: Level
level.description: Alert severity: info, warning, or critical.

ttl.name: Duration (seconds)
ttl.description: How long the alert stays on screen. 0 = until manually dismissed.
